/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-cast-qual -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g -DUNIV_DEBUG  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/ut0plist-t.dir/lot0buf.cc.o CMakeFiles/ut0plist-t.dir/mtr0log.cc.o CMakeFiles/ut0plist-t.dir/ut0dbg.cc.o CMakeFiles/ut0plist-t.dir/ut0plist.cc.o -o ../../../../runtime_output_directory/ut0plist-t  -laio
